note: Bundler3 — the user pre-sign multicall router on Ethereum mainnet. Both external-mutating selectors triaged. cover = multicall(Call[]) (the user entrypoint; decoded per-leg-to via the multicall_call_array strategy into GeneralAdapter1 position legs). exclude = reenter(Call[]) (reenterHash-guarded; callable only mid-execution by the just-called adapter — NOT a user pre-sign entrypoint).

0x374f435d.name: multicall((address,bytes,uint256,bool,bytes32)[])
0x374f435d.reason: user pre-sign entrypoint — a Call[] bundle, each Call.to a different adapter (e.g. GeneralAdapter1). Decoded per-leg-to (multicall_call_array) → ActionBody::Multicall of the mapped position legs. ~84% of Morpho-native MetaMorpho vault deposits route through here (Q1 FW-2).

0x803a7fba.name: reenter((address,bytes,uint256,bool,bytes32)[])
0x803a7fba.reason: reenterHash-guarded callback (callable only mid-execution by the adapter just called from multicall) — not a user pre-sign entrypoint. The reenter legs live inside an adapter leg's `data` arg (nested-reenter decode = documented follow-up).
